equipmentMods.amulet: If your attacks hit within 5 meters, gain extra 50% damage.
equipmentMods.belt: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Double Damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Fiery Totems: Creates a Wall of Fire in front of the player that deals 33% damage three times per second.
equipmentMods.horn: Fiery Totems: Fiery Totems triggered by you gain an additional 25% damage for each Fiery Totem on the battlefield.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain an 8% chance to spawn Mecha Golems, dealing Fire Damage infront of them for 6 seconds. Mecha Golems benefit from your Fire Damage bonus
equipmentMods.trinket: Fiery Totems: Walking over a Fiery Totem causes it to explode, setting off all other Fiery Totems. Totems that explode without dealing damage spawn an Ember Ghost that tracks enemies and deals 120% damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Statische Aufladung: Erhalte Aufladungen, indem du Gegnern Schaden zufügst. Jede Ladung fügt 1 % Blitzschaden hinzu. Bei 100 Ladungen beschwörst du Blitze über dem Schlachtfeld.
equipmentMods.horn: Flammenregen: Wenn ein Meteor landet, erzeugt er einen Lavastrom, der Gegner kontinuierlich schädigt. Die Lava bleibt 0,5 Sekunden lang bestehen und verursacht den gleichen Schaden wie Flammenregen.
equipmentMods.trinket: Blood Dragons: The dragons jump towards the player, and deal bonus damage the closer they are to their target up to +100%.

equipmentMods.trinket: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm grows larger by 57%.
